content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Nifty flat at 24029, Bank Nifty +0.28%, Pharma leads (+2.17%), Energy weak (-0.65%). Breadth healthy with multiple Q4 beats driving stock-specific moves. Book is well-deployed at 67% with 13 CNC positions; priority is risk management on existing book rather than new admissions. VIX 17.76 suggests some caution.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24250
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +6.0%, SL already at 1030 (entry 984) locking in ~4.7% gain. CMP 1043, SL trail to higher level would breach 1% trail-gap discipline (1043 × 0.99 = 1032.6, current SL 1030 already very close). Hold current SL; thesis intact (Q4 beat, sub-1% GNPA, RBI easing). Target 1110 still ~6.4% away."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down 1%, SL 119 (-4.9% buffer). Gold recovered today +1.36%. Defensive hedge — let it work. SL appropriate, thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1710,
      "new_target": 1800,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op — SL already at 1710 (entry 1700, +0.6% lock), CMP 1727. Actually leaving as-is. Correcting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down 1.6%, CMP 206.48, SL 206. Sitting right on SL — let the broker SL handle it. Lowering would violate tighten-only rule. Q4 was strong (+68% PAT), thesis intact but stock in distribution after Apr 29 spike. If SL trips, accept the small loss."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4540,
      "new_target": 4875,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.3%, CMP 4635. Original SL 4600 was tight (-0.7% trail-gap). Loosening would violate tighten-only rule. Keep SL at 4600 — wait, current is 4600 which is below CMP by ~0.75%, near the 1% floor risk. Actually retracting MODIFY: cannot loosen SL. Current SL 4600 stands. Q4/FY26 board May 14 is a binary catalyst within ~5 sessions — flagging for potential exit/trim closer to event."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.9%, CMP 7022, SL 6960 (~0.9% below CMP — at trail-gap floor). Q4 PAT +114% YoY, strong thesis. Hold; SL adjustment would either loosen (forbidden) or compress trail-gap below 1%. Target 7400 ~5.4% away."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.3%, CMP 840, SL 825 (-1.8%). Stock gave back from 862 high — typical post-gap fade. SL placement reasonable. Q4 results pending — binary risk on near-horizon; will reassess as event approaches."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 360,
      "new_target": 388,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT +30% YoY, NBFC AUM +27%, CMP 366.95 vs entry 369. Tightening SL from 358 to 360 — small (~0.6%) tighten justified given strong Q4 print de-risks the thesis. New SL 360 is 1.9% below CMP, within trail-gap discipline. Risk = 6.95 (1.9%), reward = 21 (5.7%), R:R 3.0."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.8%, CMP 826.6, SL 815 (-1.4%). Q4 beat, +9% India volume best-in-class. SL placement appropriate; target 855 still ~3.4% away. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "M&M",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -1.3%, CMP 3255, SL 3245. Sitting just above SL after strong Q4 print faded. Cannot loosen. Let SL trigger if breached. PV growth lagging Maruti/Tata is a near-term concern but Q4 PAT +42% supports thesis."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.2%, CMP 1278, SL 1265 (-1.0%, at trail-gap floor). Q4 beat, +30% revenue growth, Encora deal closing — bullish. Target 1330 ~4% away. SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -1.1%, CMP 3010, SL 2950 (-2%). Defence shipbuilding rallied today on Iran tensions; thesis intact. SL at 2950 absorbs normal volatility. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.3%, CMP 806.4, SL 780 (-3.3% buffer). Q4 record print, all-time high EBITDA margin. Stock gapped +10% — mild profit-taking expected. SL gives room. Target 855 ~6% away."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {

    },
    {

  "watchlist_notes": "WOCKPHARMA +22.5% on Zaynich USFDA narrative — too extended for fresh entry, promoter pledge 18% governance flag rules it out. AUROPHARMA pressing 52w high but Eugia Unit-II OAI overhang per Rule 13 governance DD = NO_ACTION. SUMICHEM, AJANTPHARM, LAURUSLABS, HFCL — already have a pending HFCL 600x BUY at 133.50 from earlier; CMP context not provided so monitoring. Book is at 13 CNC positions, near deployment cap; quality bar for new entries is now very high. Pharma cluster (none held), Defence cluster (HAL+GRSE+TITAGARH = 3 names, near cluster cap), Financial Services cluster (PNBHOUSING+ABCAPITAL+CAMS+BANDHANBNK = 4 — at limit, no new admissions).",
  "portfolio_notes": "Portfolio at 67% deployed with 13 CNC positions across diverse sectors. 5-day win rate 15% is poor but profit factor 1.2x means losses are being managed. Cumulative P&L -₹1,217 — flat. Today net +₹1,742. Key risks on the book: (1) HAL board meeting May 14 — binary event 6 sessions out, plan to trim/exit before; (2) TITAGARH Q4 pending — binary event near-term, monitoring; (3) M&M and BANDHANBNK sitting on SL — accept if triggered. Cluster discipline: Defence (HAL, GRSE, TITAGARH) = 3 names = ~₹1.16L = ~12% of capital, within cluster guideline. Financial Services (PNBHOUSING, ABCAPITAL, CAMS, BANDHANBNK) = 4 names = ~₹1.86L = ~18% of capital, at the cluster soft cap — NO new financial-services admissions. No new entries this tick — book is full and quality of management is more valuable than chasing gap-up momentum names like WOCKPHARMA/CAMS/TITAGARH which have already moved 9-22%."
}
